response.overview: Mr. A.B. Leguía, vigorous spirit shaping the most transcendent national reforms; Communal authorities who have contributed to the success of the festivities; The old carnival; The beautiful candidates for the 1924 crown and Her Majesty Carmen I; The queen of Callao; Other sovereigns; Aspects of the lively game; The gracious queens of Lima and seaside resorts with their courts in the 1925 carnival; The children's reign; The Moorish queens, a nocturnal vision of the carnival; The parade of the artistic floats; A bouquet of cherubs; Pierrot, the eternal and romantic, and Columbine, the incorrigible flirt, a precious silhouette; The dawn of the 1926 carnival; A piece of news that brings joy; Pepe's tribute; Her Majesty Luz Mila I; The gracious queen receives the tribute of her people; Luzmila I has her fairy hands to caress the children because in her heart beats the feeling of the sweet and venerable matron Doña Juana Alarco de Dammert.
response.title: Lima de mis amores (primer capítulo)
